title: In the morning, in the morning,
content:
In the morning, in the morning,
    In the happy field of hay,
    Oh they looked at one another
    By the light of day.

    In the blue and silver morning
    On the haycock as they lay,
    Oh they looked at one another
    And they looked away.
meaning:
Alfred Edward Housman's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "In the morning, in the morning,"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
